title: Google Workspace / Agent Space Engineer
description:
Company Overview

LeapThought is a leading provider of strategic consulting services and business technology solutions focused on driving transformational outcomes. We design and build platforms that enable businesses to be more efficient and deliver frictionless experiences for more customers. Everyday, tens of thousands of New Zealanders use services developed by LeapThought to manage essential daily activities - from booking transport and paying power bills to interacting with their local council. Our core philosophy of do it once reflects how common problems can be tackled with repeatable frameworks and accelerators. This makes better technology solutions that more accessible and are more cost effective for everyone. We advocate and follow an inclusive "business driven" approach at all times connecting the strategic, operational and technical viewpoints together to ensure our on-going success in delivering results for our customers. While we are "agile" we easily fit in with our customer preferences in terms of methodologies, standards and tools. We are privately held and based in New Zealand with offices in Auckland, Singapore, Sydney and Hyderabad, India.

Job Summary

We are seeking a Google Workspace / Agent Space Engineer to manage and automate collaboration environments, identity workflows, and security policies across our organization.

Key Responsibilities

  • Administer Google Workspace components including Users, Groups, Gmail, Drive, and Vault to ensure seamless collaboration and data management
  • Implement and enforce access controls, data loss prevention (DLP), retention, and security policies to protect organizational data and maintain compliance
  • Automate onboarding and offboarding processes by developing and maintaining APIs and scripts to improve operational efficiency
  • Troubleshoot issues related to Workspace tools, integrations, and collaboration platforms to minimize downtime and enhance user experience
  • Manage licensing, monitor usage analytics, and enforce governance policies to optimize resource allocation and compliance
  • Support integration efforts with identity providers and SaaS security platforms to strengthen authentication and security posture

Requirements

  • Min 4 years of experience administering Google Workspace environments
  • Proficient knowledge of Identity and Access Management (IAM), OAuth protocols, API integrations, and automation scripting to streamline workflows
  • Familiarity with SaaS security frameworks, Mobile Device Management (MDM), and endpoint control mechanisms to safeguard organizational assets
  • Strong troubleshooting skills applied to diagnosing and resolving Workspace-related technical issues
  • Effective communication skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams and stakeholders
